bot_routing: When user asks what JanJan is or who the bot is.
content: Josh / Uno is the Discord bot (Pogi APP display): Taglish beki/maldita persona, Groq chat, voice TTS (j!vc), STT (j!listen/j!ask), music (j!play). The bot is NOT Drei — Drei is the human creator only. Prefix: j!.

bot_routing: How to make JanJan talk in voice or join VC.
content:
VOICE COMMANDS:
- j!join — bot joins your current voice channel.
- j!leave — bot leaves voice.
- j!vc <text> — text-to-speech: you must be in VC; bot speaks your text (Edge TTS, Filipino voices Angelo/Blessica).
- j!voice m / j!change f — switch TTS voice gender.
- j!ask <question> — AI answer + TTS in VC.
- j!ask (no args) / j!listen — voice listening mode (STT via Groq Whisper).
- j!stop — stop listening.
Music and TTS cannot run at the same time; stop music first.

MUSIC (prefix j!):
- j!play <url or search> — play from YouTube/Spotify links or search.
- Queue controls: skip, pause, resume, stop, shuffle, etc. (see j!help in server).
- Backend: Lavalink (Docker/Render bundled) or direct play-dl (render.fast.yaml).
- While music is active, TTS/voice-AI commands are blocked until music stops.

CHAT & MEMORY:
- Mention or reply to JanJan for AI chat (Groq).
- j!help — command list.
- j!admin — admin panel info (admins only).
- j!status <text> — set bot custom status.
- j!view @user — profile-style summary from DB memory.
- j!research on/off — admin toggles Tavily web search + sources for latest/news questions.
- Channel/user facts stored in Postgres; bot recalls context in long threads.

RENDER DEPLOY:
- render.yaml — Docker web service with bundled Lavalink (slower build, full music).
- render.fast.yaml — Node-only, npm install, MUSIC_BACKEND=direct (faster deploy ~1–2 min).
- Required env: DISCORD_TOKEN, DATABASE_URL, GROQ_API_KEY1–6 (or GROQ_API_KEY). Optional: TAVILY_API_KEY, LEONARDO_API_KEY.
- WEB_ENABLED=true exposes /health, /ready, /ping.
- Groq keys must start with gsk_ with no quotes in dashboard. Invalid keys rotate automatically.

bot_routing: Only when user asks about j! commands — NOT for chismis chat.
content:
BOT COMMAND INDEX (optional, separate from human chismis memory):
- data/janjan_knowledge_chunks.json = j! command help only.
- npm run rag:seed = index bot commands in rag_chunks (admin).
- NORMAL CHAT uses per-user human memory: user_memory + user_style_memory + channel_memory + messages — automatic, malandi tone, NO FAQ.

bot_routing: When asked about JanJan's partner or love life.
content:
RELATIONSHIP LORE (current):
- JanJan is on a break/space; do NOT name the ex/partner.
- If asked sino mahal/bebe/jowa/pogi: say "1 month akong waiting muna, baka bumalik pa siya!" then playful landi/pokpok banter.
- Default chat vibe: pokpok/landi energy, flirty and bold, not soft partner mode.

GROQ KEYS:
- Set GROQ_API_KEY1 through GROQ_API_KEY6 and/or GROQ_API_KEY in Render Environment.
- Keys must start with gsk_; no surrounding quotes.
- Bot rotates on 429 rate limit and 401 invalid key; startup probe logs which keys work.
- npm run test:groq-keys tests all configured keys locally.
